rootCauses.rootCause: Engineering artifacts were not connected through one versioned recalculable provenance graph.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use isolated links or prose to reconstruct engineering history.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Build a deterministic twelve-stage provenance graph from exact objects, structured markers, canonical fields, and durable references.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Trusted governance validates graph schema, digest, repository-owned references, legal transitions, and linked finding coverage.

rootCauses.rootCause: Confirmed root-cause occurrences were not correlated with effective prevention controls and escalation.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Record the latest occurrence without calculating prior history or rule applicability.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Build a deterministic recurrence series from exact identity, effective rule evidence, reviewed explanations, and occurrence counts.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Trusted governance evaluates unresolved post-rule recurrence and preserves pre-rule history separately.

rootCauses.rootCause: Executive engineering reporting lacked source-backed operational metrics and coverage.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use one aggregate count as the engineering quality report.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Generate a versioned snapshot with formulas, denominators, coverage, freshness, and evidence status.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Governance recalculates dashboard records and the weekly workflow publishes read-only artifacts.
